introSection: Phoenix is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Adventureland in Altoona, Iowa, USA. It was manufactured by Maurer AG and opened on July 4, 2019. The ride replaced the defunct Inverter on Adventureland's Midway.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On December 11, 2018, Adventureland announced that Phoenix would be added for the 2019 season.

Phoenix opened on July 4, 2019.

fullText:
Phoenix is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Adventureland in Altoona, Iowa, USA. It was manufactured by Maurer AG and opened on July 4, 2019. The ride replaced the defunct Inverter on Adventureland's Midway.

On December 11, 2018, Adventureland announced that Phoenix would be added for the 2019 season.

Phoenix opened on July 4, 2019.
